items.title: Mittal family buys 75% stake in Rajasthan Royals for about ₹15,600 crore; Somani deal falls through
items.summary: The restructured Rajasthan Royals board will comprise Lakshmi N. Mittal, Aditya Mittal, Vanisha Mittal-Bhatia, Adar Poonawalla and Manoj Badale
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
